form.formComment: Has finished sixth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 7 lengths behind Late In Winter over 520m. Capable of taking this out.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (30.36) in a Grade 5, finishing a 5.5 lengths fourth. Has performed well off the draw with a win and three places from seven starts. Looks well placed and should feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly and was slow to begin.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Richmond over 320m. Last start finished 4th in a Grade 4/5 on April 1 over 320m at Richmond behind Muscle Memory beaten 2.25 lengths (18.46). Key chance on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together in the first turn and lost ground.

form.formComment: Solid performance after tracking the speed to win by one length at Bulli over 400m (22.52) beating Magic Linkin in Grade 4/5 on March 31. Others better.

form.formComment: Eye-catching performance to post a big 3.5 lengths victory in a Grade 5 last start at Nowra, recording a dynamic 29.64 over the 520m journey. Harder here but warrants respect on latest.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when second (29.76) at big odds over 520m at Richmond. Boxed out wide and needs to find best form to feature.

form.formComment: Quickly away at Nowra two runs back then again settled forward and finished third at this track last start over 520m. This appears within her reach.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a strong early split, giving a sight but fading only late to finish third (30.08) at Nowra over 520m. Among the chances with the right run.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th over 527m at Gunnedah beaten 4 lengths (30.96) behind Zipping Wheeler in a Grade 5 on April 4. Capable of a strong show.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Exiting the first turn, was tightened for room and lost ground.
Shortly after the start hampered and came together.

form.formComment: Recent form has been ordinary and she is facing a tougher line up. Others preferred at this stage.
